title: ranunculus flammula subsp. flammula
intro: Ranunculus flammula subsp. flammula, also known as lesser spearwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Ranunculus flammula subsp. flammula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
